purpose: Seed a five-public-PR pilot before any twenty-case evaluation expansion.
scaleRule: Do not expand to 20 external PRs until these 5 cases have been run, reviewed, and revised without report-input oracle leakage.

reportInput.title: fix: handle prototype-colliding segment names in segment explorer trie
reportInput.publicTaskContext: Fixes vercel/next.js#95395; checks prototype-colliding names in the segment explorer trie.

knownPublicSignals.checkSummary: Public check rollup showed completed build-and-test jobs with success conclusions when observed.

manualLabels.notes: Candidate for a clean PR pilot; do not feed these manual labels into report generation.

limitations: Manual labels are not confirmed until a reviewer session records the expected first inspection path.

reportInput.title: Update font data
reportInput.publicTaskContext: Auto-generated public PR that updates font data with the latest available data.

knownPublicSignals.checkSummary: Public check rollup was observed on an open PR; targeted test evidence should be evaluated from report output, not this label file.

manualLabels.notes: Candidate for the missing-test-evidence pilot; reviewer must confirm whether existing automation is enough.

limitations: Bot-generated data updates can have repository-specific validation that is not visible from changed file names alone.

reportInput.title: Turbopack: add extension alias config option to match alternate file extensions
reportInput.publicTaskContext: Adds a Turbopack config option for extension aliases and mentions a known dynamic-import limitation.

knownPublicSignals.checkSummary: Public check rollup showed completed build-and-test jobs with success conclusions when observed.

manualLabels.notes: Candidate for a broad-surface scope-creep audit; the label is unresolved until reviewer confirmation.

limitations: Broad file coverage can be justified by feature shape; AgentProof must not mark scope creep without evidence.

reportInput.title: fix(create-next-app): make AGENTS.md blue
reportInput.publicTaskContext: Small visual/copy change in create-next-app output with a screenshot in the public PR description.

knownPublicSignals.checkSummary: Public check rollup showed failed lint and final build-and-test summary conclusions when observed.

manualLabels.notes: Candidate for failed-CI prioritization; report generation must discover check evidence separately.

limitations: Open PR check state can change; the pilot session must record the observed check state at run time.

reportInput.title: fix: update next/image usage and improve accessibility in TwoColumnWithImage
reportInput.publicTaskContext: Updates next/image usage and says layout was verified across image positions and screen sizes.

knownPublicSignals.checkSummary: Candidate should be run live so AgentProof can decide whether visual proof is available or only asserted.

manualLabels.notes: Candidate for vague-task or visual-proof-gap handling; reviewer must fill first files after a live run.

limitations: Changed files were not copied into this fixture; live PR fetch should provide deterministic file evidence before scoring.
